chunks.title: Satan's Challenge and Affliction
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue between Yahweh and Satan regarding Job's integrity followed by the execution of the affliction.

chunks.title: Job's Suffering and Response
chunks.reason: Describes Job's physical pain and his dialogue with his wife where he maintains his integrity.

chunks.title: The Arrival of the Friends
chunks.reason: Narrates the three friends hearing of Job's calamity, arriving to mourn with him, and sitting in silence.
